text.message: I’m very curious about blue’s placements
Ummmm you could’ve blocked 2 people a lot of other places
I blocked multiple people. You made the choice not to build on either of those
Man green, what did I do to you?
You could play it on the guy in the lead
You are really strong with that settle res
is this spot on the map bugged?
i cant place street or settle
Crazy how I’ve been the target all game
Dude, you took from me instead of orange
No one is trading with 9 points
Guys I’ll be at zero and we willl fight
He has 2 cards, can’t win next turn
It was wild to not trade it
